previous_errors: Risk index weights must sum to 1.0
Parser grounding should be in top five risk modes

ohri.purpose: Rank operational danger if the failure mode reaches action.

top_5.name: unsafe_merge_suggestion
top_5.casulo_control: Enforce blocked_actions: automatic_merge, codex_execution, implementation_execution unless explicitly approved.

top_5.name: production_readiness_leakage
top_5.casulo_control: Require production gate, sandbox flag, evidence status, blocked production_activation and human approval state.

top_5.name: repo_state_mismatch
top_5.casulo_control: Use branch, commit, git status, file tree, recent tags and validators as state packet.

top_5.name: api_contract_hallucination
top_5.casulo_control: Require OpenAPI/schema, endpoint inventory, mock fixtures and contract tests.

top_5.name: generic_rag_answer_without_gate
top_5.casulo_control: Transform retrieved context into state packet with gate, risk, evidence, blocked actions and next allowed action.

ranking.name: unsafe_merge_suggestion
ranking.casulo_control: Enforce blocked_actions: automatic_merge, codex_execution, implementation_execution unless explicitly approved.

ranking.name: production_readiness_leakage
ranking.casulo_control: Require production gate, sandbox flag, evidence status, blocked production_activation and human approval state.

ranking.name: repo_state_mismatch
ranking.casulo_control: Use branch, commit, git status, file tree, recent tags and validators as state packet.

ranking.name: api_contract_hallucination
ranking.casulo_control: Require OpenAPI/schema, endpoint inventory, mock fixtures and contract tests.

ranking.name: generic_rag_answer_without_gate
ranking.casulo_control: Transform retrieved context into state packet with gate, risk, evidence, blocked actions and next allowed action.

ranking.name: contract_omission
ranking.casulo_control: Require contract, schema, checks, expected outputs and blocked actions before implementation.

ranking.name: testless_code_generation
ranking.casulo_control: Require fixture, golden output, validator and PASS/FAIL evidence.

ranking.name: generic_parser_generation
ranking.casulo_control: Require real workbook inventory, schema, field mapping, fixtures, golden output and validator before implementation.

ranking.name: schema_invention
ranking.casulo_control: Bind generation to declared schema, source inventory, contract and diffable evidence.

ranking.name: conditional_client_claim_leakage
ranking.casulo_control: Require explicit gate, evidence status, output_mode and client_facing_claim blocked/unblocked state.

ranking.name: generic_validation_laundering
ranking.casulo_control: Separate checklist suggestion from decision. Require status: validated, pending review, blocked or insufficient evidence.

ranking.name: file_structure_hallucination
ranking.casulo_control: Require repo/file inventory and path existence checks before patch planning.

ranking.name: business_recommendation_without_limits
ranking.casulo_control: Require company profile, risk level, package candidate, gates, safe scope and blocked implementation actions.

ranking.name: context_contamination
ranking.casulo_control: Require clean chat/source metadata and mark contaminated captures as exploratory only.

ranking.name: provider_contamination
ranking.casulo_control: Require provider/model/source fields and separate exploratory captures from calibration captures.

ranking.name: ui_metadata_contamination
ranking.casulo_control: Require cleaning rules and raw vs cleaned response fields.
